block.header: asipikwino yama yukisikaba yamabito no ware ni esimesi yamatutwo so kore
asipikwino yama ni yukikyemu yamabito no kokoro mo sirazu yamabito ya tare
takamatwo no wobana pukikwosu akikaze ni pimo tokiakena tada narazu tomo
amakumo ni kari so naku naru takamatwo no pagwi no sitaba pa momiti apemu kamo
wominapyesi akipagwi sinwogi sawosika no tuyu wakenakamu takamatwo no nwo so
simo no upe ni arare tabasiri iya masi ni are pa mawikomu tosinowo nagaku
tositukwi pa arataaratani apimiredo a ga mopu kimi pa akidaranu kamo
kasumitatu paru no pazime wo kyepu no goto mimu to omopeba tanwosi to so mopu
inaminwo no akaragasipa pa toki pa aredo kimi wo a ga mopu toki pa sane nasi
yamabuki pa nadetutu oposamu aritutu mo kimi kimasitutu kazasitarikyeri
wa ga sekwo ga yadwo no yamabuki sakite araba yamazu kaywopamu iya tosinopa ni
yamabuki no pana no sakari ni kaku no goto kimi wo mimaku pa titose ni moga mo
konokure no sigeki wonope wo pototogisu nakite kwoyu nari ima si ku rasi mo
patuakikaze suzusiki yupubye tokamu to so pimo pa musubisi imo ni apamu tame
aki to ipeba kokoro so itaki utate kyeni pana ni naswopete mimaku pori kamo
patuwobana pana ni mimu to si ama no kapa pyenarinikye rasi tosinowo nagaku
akikaze ni nabiku kapabwi no nikwogusa no nikwoyokani si mo omopoyuru kamo
aki sareba kwiri tatiwataru ama no gapa isinami okaba tugwite mimu kamo
akikaze ni ima ka ima ka to pimo tokite uramati woru ni tukwi katabukinu
akigusa ni oku siratuyu no akazu nomwi apimiru monowo tukwi wo si matamu
awonami ni swode sape nurete kogu pune no kasi puru potwo ni saywo pukenamu ka
yatigusa ni kusakwi wo uwete toki gotoni sakamu pana wo si mitutu sinwopana
miyapito no swodetukegoromo akipagwi ni nipopi yorosiki takamatwo no miya
takamatwo no miya no suswomwi no nwodukasa ni ima sakyeru ramu wominapyesi pa mo
akinwo ni pa ima koso yukame mononopu no wotokwowomina no pananipopi mi ni
aki no nwo ni tuyu opyeru pagwi wo taworazute atarasakari wo sugusitemu to ka
takamatwo no akinwo no upe no asagwiri ni tuma ywobu wosika idetatu ramu ka
masurawo no ywobitatesikaba sawosika no munawake yukamu akinwo pagwipara
kasikwoki ya mikoto kagapuri asu yuri ya kaye ga muta nemu imu nasi nisite
wa ga tuma pa itaku kwopwi rasi nomu midu ni kago sape miyete yo ni wasurarezu
tokidoki no pana pa sakedomo nani sure so papa to pu pana no sakide kozukyemu
topetapomi sirupa no iswo to nipe no ura to apite si araba koto mo kayupamu
titipapa mo pana ni moga mo ya kusamakura tabi pa yuku tomo sasagote yukamu
titipapa ga tono no siripye no momoyogusa momoyo idemase wa ga kitaru made
wa ga tuma mo we ni kakitoramu iduma moka tabi yuku are pa mitutu sinwopamu
opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi iswo ni puri unopara wataru titipapa wo okite
yaswokuni pa nanipa ni tudwopi punakazari a ga semu piro wo mimo pito moga mo
nanipatu ni yosopi yosopite kepu no pi ya idete makaramu miru papa nasi ni

sumyeroki no topono mikadwo to siranupi tukusinokuni pa ata mamoru osape no kwi so to kikosiwosu yomo no kuni ni pa pito sapani mitite pa aredo toriganaku adumawonokwo pa idemukapi kapyerimisezute isamitaru takyeki ikusa to negwitamapi make no manima ni taratineno papa ga me karete wakakusano tuma wo mo makazu aratamano tukwipi yomitutu asi ga tiru nanipa no mitu ni opopune ni makai sizinuki asanagi ni kakwo totonope yupusipo ni kadi pikiwori adomopite kogiyuku kimi pa nami no ma wo iyukisagukumi masakiku mo payaku itarite opokimi no mikoto no manima masurawo no kokoro wo motite arimeguri koto si woparaba tutumapazu kapyerikimase to ipapibe wo tokopye ni suwete sirwotapeno swode worikapyesi nubatamano kurwokami sikite nagaki ke wo mati ka mo kwopwimu pasiki tumara pa
masurawo no yuki toriopite idete ikeba wakare wo wosimi nagekikyemu tuma
toriganaku adumawotokwo no tuma wakare kanasiku arikyemu tosinowo nagami
unapara wo topoku watarite tosi pu tomo kwora ga musubyeru pimo toku na yume
ima kaparu nipisakimori ga punade suru unapara no upe ni nami na saki sone
sakimori no poriye kogiduru idutebune kadi toru ma naku kwopwi pa sikekyemu
midutorino tati no iswogi ni titipapa ni monopazu kyenite ima zo kuyasiki
tatamikeme murazi ga iswo no panariswo no papa wo panarete yuku ga kanasisa
kuni meguru atori kama keri yukimeguri kapiriku madeni ipapite matane
totipapa ye ipapite matane tukusi n aru miduku siratama torite ku madeni
tatibana no miwori no satwo ni titi wo okite miti no nagate pa yukikatenu kamo
makepasira pomete tukureru tono no goto imase papatwozi ome kapari sezu
waro tabi pa tabi to omepodo ipi nisite kwo meti yasu ramu wa ga mi kanasi mo
wasuramu te nwo yuki yama yuki ware kuredo wa ga titipapa pa wasure senu kamo
wagimekwo to putari wa ga misi utiyesuru suruga no nera pa kupusiku me aru ka
titipapa ga kasira kakinade saku are te ipisi ketoba ze wasurekaneturu
ipe ni site kwopwitutu arazupa na ga pakeru tati ni narite mo ipapitesi kamo
taratineno papa wo wakarete makoto ware tabwi no karipo ni yasuku nemu kamo
momokuma no miti pa kinisi wo mata sarani yaswosima sugwite wakare ka yukamu
nipanaka no asupa no kami ni kwosiba sasi are pa ipapamu kaperiku madeni
tabikoromo yape kikasanete inuredomo napo pada samusi imo ni si araneba
miti no pe no umara no ure ni papo mame no karamaru kimi wo pakare ka yukamu
ipekaze pa pi ni pi ni pukedo wagimokwo ga ipegoto motite kuru pito mo nasi
tatikomono tati no sawaki ni apimitesi imo ka kokoro pa wasure senu kamo
yoso ni nomi mite ya wataramo nanipagata kumowi ni miyuru sima naranaku ni
wa ga papa no swode motinadete wa ga kara ni nakisi kokoro wo wasurayenu kamo
asikaki no kumatwo ni tatite wagimokwo ga swode mo sipoponi nakisi so mopayu
opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi idekureba wanwo toritukite ipisi kwona pa mo
tukusipe ni pye mukaru pune no itu si ka mo tukapyematurite kuni ni pe mukamo

sumyeroki no topoki miyo ni mo ositeru nanipa no kuni ni ame no sita sirasimyesiki to ima no yo ni tayezu ipitutu kakemaku mo ayani kasikwosi kamunagara wa go opokimi no utinabiku paru no pazime pa yatikusa ni pana sakinipopi yama mireba mi no tomosiku kapa mireba mi no sayakeku mono gotoni sakayuru toki to myesitamapi akirametamapi sikimaseru nanipanomiya pa kikosiwosu yomo no kuni ywori tatematuru mitukwi no pune pa poriye ywori miwobiki situtu asanagi ni kadi piki nobori yupusipo ni sawo sasi kudari adimura no sawagikipopite pama ni idete unapara mireba siranami no yapyeworu ga upe ni amawobune pararani ukite opomike ni tukapematuru to wotikoti ni izariturikyeri sokidaku mo ogironaki kamo kokibaku mo yutakeki kamo koko mireba ube si kamwiyo yu pazimekye rasi mo
sakurabana ima sakari nari nanipa no umi ositeru miya ni kikosimyesu nape
unapara no yutakeki mitutu asi ga tiru nanipa ni tosi pa penu beku omopoyu
nanipatu ni mipune orosuwe yaswoka nuki ima pa kokinu to imo ni tugekoso
sakimuri ni tatamu sawaki ni ipye no imu ga naru byeki koto wo ipazu kinu kamo
ositeruya nanipa no tu yuri punayosopi are pa koginu to imo ni tugikoso
pitati sasi yukamu kari moga a ga kwopi wo sirusite tugyete imo ni sirasemu
a ga mote no wasuremo sida pa tukupane wo purisakemitutu imo pa sinupane
kuzigapa pa sakeku arimate sipopune ni makadi sizinuki wa pa kapyerikomu
tukupane no sayuru no pana no yutoko ni mo kanasikye imo so piru mo kanasikye
arare puri kasima no kami wo inoritutu sumera mikusa ni ware pa kinisi wo
tatibana no sita puku kaze no kagupasiki tukupanoyama wo kwopwisu arame kamo

asikara no misaka tamapari kaperimisu are pa kuyeyuku arasi wo mo tasi ya pabakaru pupa no seki kuyete wa pa yuku mumanotume tukusi no saki ni timariwite are pa ipapamu moromoro pa sakyeku to mawosu kaperiku madeni
kyepu yori pa kapyerimi nakute opokimi no sikono mitate to idetatu ware pa
ametuti no kami wo inorite satuya nuki tukusinosima wo sasite iku ware pa
matu no ke no namitaru mireba ipabito no ware wo miokuru to tatarisi mokoro
tabi yuki ni yuku to sirazute amosisi ni koto mawosazute ima zo kuyasike
amotwozi mo tama ni moga mo ya itadakite midura no naka ni apyemakamaku mo
tukupi ya pa sugu pa yuketomo amosisi ka tama no sugata pa wasure senapu mo
siranami no yosoru pamape ni wakarenaba itwo mo sube nami yatabi swode puru
nanipatwo wo kokidete mireba kamisaburu ikwomatakane ni kumo so tanabiku
kuniguni no sakimori tudwopi punanorite wakaru wo mireba itwo mo subye nasi
putapogami asike pito nari atayumapi wa ga suru toki ni sakimori ni sasu
tunokuni no umi no nagisa ni punayosopi tasidemo toki ni amo ga me moga mo
akatoki no kapataredoki ni simakagi wo koginisi pune no taduki sirazu mo
yukwo saki ni nami na towerapi sirubye ni pa kwo wo to tuma wo to okite to mo kinu
wa ka kadu no itumoto yanagi itu mo itu mo omo ka kwopisusu narimasitutu mo
tiba no nu no kwonotekasipa no popomaredo ayani kanasimi okite takakinu
tabi to pyedo matabi ni narinu ipye no mo ga kisesi koromo ni aka tukinikari
sipopune no pye kwoso siranami nipasiku mo opusetamapo ka omopapyenaku ni
muratamano kuru ni kugi sasi katametosi imo ka kokoro pa aywoku name kamo
kuniguni no yasiro no kami ni nusa maturi a ka kwopi su namu imo ga kanasisa
ametusi no idure no kami wo inoraba ka utukusi papa ni mata kototwopamu
opokimi no mikoto ni s areba titipapa wo ipapibye to okite mawite kinisi wo
opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi yumi no mita sane ka wataramu nagake ko no ywo wo
tatutayama mitutu kwoyekosi sakurapana tiri ka sugwinamu wa ga kapyeru twoni
poriye ywori asasipomiti ni yoru kotumi kapi ni ariseba tutwo ni semasi wo
miwataseba mukatuwo no pe no pana nipopi terite tateru pa pasiki ta ga tuma

opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi tuma wakare kanasiku pa aredo masurawo no kokoro puriokosi toriyosopi kadwode wo sureba taratineno papa kakinade wakakusano tuma pa torituki tapirakeku ware pa ipapamu masakikute paya kapyeriko to maswode moti namita wo nogopi musepitutu katarapi sureba muratorino idetatikateni todokopori kapyerimi situtu iya toponi kuni wo kipanare iya takani yama wo kwoyesugwi asi ga tiru nanipa ni kiwite yupusipo ni pune wo ukesuwe asanagi ni pe muke kogamu to samorapu to wa ga woru toki ni parugasumi simamwi ni tatite tadugane no kanasiku nakeba paroparoni ipye wo omopide opisoya no soyoto naru made nagekituru kamo
unapara ni kasumi tanabiki tadugane no kanasiki yopi pa kunipye si omopoyu
ipye omopu to i wo nezu woreba tadu ga naku asipye mo miyezu paru no kasumi ni
karakoromu suswo ni torituki naku kwora wo okite so kinu ya omo nasi nisite
tipayaburu kami no misaka ni nusa maturi ipapu inoti pa omotiti ga tame
opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi awokumu no tonobiku yama wo kwoyote kinu kamu
nanipadi wo yukite ku made to wagimokwo ga tukesi pwimo ga wo tayenikeru kamo
wa ga imokwo ga sinupi ni seyo to tukesi pwimo itwo ni naru tomo wa pa tokazi to yo
wa ga iparo ni yukamo pito moga kusamakura tabi pa kurusi to tugeyaramaku mo
pinakumori usupi no saka wo kwoye sida ni imo ga kwopisiku wasurayenu kamo

opokimi no make no manima ni simamori ni wa ga tatikureba papaswobano papa no mikoto pa mimo no suswo tumiage kakinade titinomwino titi no mikoto pa takudunwono sirapige no upe yu namita tari nagekinotabaku kakwozimono tada pitori site asatwode no kanasiki wa ga kwo aratamano tosinowo nagaku apimizupa kwopwisiku aru besi kyepu dani mo kotodopi semu to wosimitutu kanasibwimaseba wakakusano tuma mo kwodomo mo wotikoti ni sapani kakumiwi parutori no kowe no samaywopi sirwotapeno swode nakinurasi tadusapari wakarekatenito pikitodome sitapisi monowo opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi tamapoko no miti ni idetati woka no saki itamuru gotoni yorodutabi kapyerimi situtu paroparoni wakare si kureba omopu swora yasuku mo arazu kwopuru swora kurusiki monowo utusemi no yo no pito nareba tamakiparu inoti mo sirazu unapara no kasikwoki miti wo simadutapi ikogiwatarite arimeguri wa ga kuru madeni tapirakeku oya pa imasane tutumi naku tuma pa matase to suminoye no a ga sumyekamwi ni nusa maturi inorimawosite nanipatu ni pune wo ukesuwe yaswoka nuki kakwo totonopete asabiraki wa pa kogidenu to ipye ni tugekoso
ipyebito no ipape ni ka aramu tapirakeku punade pa sinu to oya ni mawosane
miswora yuku kumo mo tukapi to pito pa ipedo ipyedutwo yaramu taduki sirazu mo
ipyedutwo ni kapi so piripyeru pamanami pa iya sikusikuni takaku yosuredo
simakage ni wa ga pune patete tugeyaramu tukapi wo nami ya kwopwitutu yukamu
makuratasi kosi ni toripaki makanasiki sero ga makikomu tuku no siranaku
opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi utukusike makwo ga te panari simadutapiyuku
siratama wo te ni tworimosite miru nosu mo ipye n aru imo wo mata mitemo mo ya
kusamakura tapi yuku sena ga marune seba ipa n aru ware pa pimo tokazu nemu
akagwoma wo yama nwo ni pagasi tworikanite tama no yokoyama kasi yu ka yaramu
wa ga kadwo no katayamatubaki makoto nare wa ga te purenana tuti ni otimo kamo
iparo ni pa asipu takedomo sumiyoke wo tukusi ni itarite kwopusike mopamo
kusamakura tabi no marune no pimo tayeba a ga te to tukero kore no paru mosi
wa ga yuki no ikidukusikaba asigara no mine papo kumo wo mitoto sinwopane
wa ga sena wo tukusi pe yarite utukusimi obi pa tokanana ayani ka mo nemo
asigara no misaka ni tasite swode puraba ipa n aru imo pa sayani mimo kamo
iro bukaku sena ga koromo pa somemasi wo misaka tabaraba masayakani mimu
sakimori ni yuku pa ta ga se to twopu pito wo miru ga tomosisa monomopi mo sezu
ametusi no kamwi ni nusa oki ipapitutu imase wa ga sena are wo si mopaba
ipa no imoro wa wo sinopu rasi mayusupi ni yusupisi pimo no tokuraku mopeba
wa ga sena wo tukusi pa yarite utukusimi yepi pa tokanana ayani ka mo nemu
umaya n aru napa tatu kwoma no okuru gapye imo ga ipisi wo okite kanasi mo
arasi wo no iwosa dapasami mukapitati kanarumasidumi idete to a ga kuru
sasa ga pa no sayagu simoywo ni nanapye karu koromo ni maseru kworo ga pada pa mo
sapyenapyenu mikoto ni areba kanasi imo ga tamakura panare ayani kanasi mo
asanasana agaru pibari ni naritesika miyakwo ni yukite paya kapyerikomu
pibari agaru parupye to sayani narinureba miyakwo mo miyezu kasumi tanabiku
pupumyerisi pana no pazime ni kosi ware ya tirinamu noti ni miyakwo pye yukamu
yamwi no ywo no yuku saki sirazu yuku ware wo itu kimasamu to topisi kwora pa mo
pototogisu napo mo nakanamu moto tu pito kaketutu motona a wo ne si naku mo
pototogisu koko ni tikaku wo kinakiteyo sugwinamu noti ni sirusi arame ya mo
matu ga ye no tuti ni tuku made puru yuki wo mizute ya imo ga komori woru ramu
asigara no yapyeyama kwoyete imasinaba tare wo ka kimi to mitutu sinwopamu
tatisinapu kimi ga sugata wo wasurezupa yo no kagiri ni ya kwopwiwatarinamu
wa ga sekwo ga yadwo no nadesikwo pi narabete ame pa puredomo iro mo kaparazu
pisakatano ame pa purisiku nadesikwo ga iya patupana ni kwopwisiki wa ga se
wa ga sekwo ga yadwo n aru pagwi no pana sakamu aki no yupubye pa ware wo sinwopase
ugupisu no kowe pa sugwinu to omopedomo siminisi kokoro napo kwopwinikyeri
wa ga yadwo ni sakyeru nadesikwo mapi pa semu yume pana tiru na iya woti ni sakye
mapi situtu kimi ga oposeru nadesikwo ga pana nomwi topamu kimi naranaku ni
adisawi no yapye saku gotoku yatuyo ni wo imase wa ga sekwo mitutu sinwopamu
nadesikwo ga pana torimotite uturautura mimaku no posiki kimi ni mo aru kamo
wa ga sekwo ga yadwo no nadesikwo tirame ya mo iya patupana ni saki pa masu tomo
urupasimi a ga mopu kimi pa nadesikwo ga pana ni naswopete miredo akanu kamo
wotomyera ga tamamo suswobiku ko no nipa ni akikaze pukite pana pa tiritutu
akikaze no puki kwokisikyeru pana no nipa kiywoki tukuywo ni miredo akanu kamo
takayama no ipapo ni opuru suganoneno nemokorogoroni purioku sirayuki
akanesasu piru pa ta tabite nubatamano yworu no itwoma ni tumyeru seri kore
masurawo to omopyeru monowo tati pakite kanipa no tawi ni seri so tumikyeru
suminoye no pamamatu ga ne no sitabapete wa ga miru wonwo no kusa na kari sone
nipodorino okinagakapa pa tayenu tomo kimi ni kataramu koto tukwime ya mo
asi kari ni poriye kogu naru kadi no oto pa opomiyapito no mwina kiku madeni
poriye kogu idute no pune no kaditukume oto sibatatinu miwo payami kamo
poriye ywori miwo sakanoboru kadi no oto no manaku so nara pa kwopwisikarikyeru
punagipopu poriye no kapa no minakipa ni kiwitutu naku pa miyakwodori kamo
pototogisu madu naku asake ikani seba wa ga kadwo sugwizi kataritugu made
pototogisu kaketutu kimi ga matukage ni pimo tokisakuru tukwi tikadukinu

pisakatano ama no two piraki takatipo no take ni amorisi sumyeroki no kamwi no miyo ywori paziyumi wo tanigwiri motasi makagwoya wo tabasamiswopete opokume no masuratakyewo wo saki ni tate yuki toriopose yamakapa wo ipane sakumite pumitopori kuni magi situtu tipayaburu kamwi wo kotomuke maturopenu pito wo mo yapasi pakikiywome tukapematurite akidusima yamatonokuni no kasipara no unebwi no miya ni miyabasira putwosiritatete ame no sita sirasimyesikyeru sumyeroki no ama no pitugi to tugite kuru kimi no miyomiyo kakusapanu akaki kokoro wo sumyerabye ni kipametukusite tukapekuru oya no tukasa to kotodatete saduketamapyeru umi no kwo no iya tugitugini miru pito no kataritugitete kiku pito no kagami ni semu wo atarasiki kiywoki so no na so oborokani kokoro omopite munakoto mo oya no na tatu na opotomo no udi to na ni opyeru masurawo no tomo
sikwisimano yamatonokuni ni akirakeki na ni opu tomonowo kokoro tutwomeyo
turugitati iyoyo twogu besi inisipye yu sayakeku opite kinisi so no na so
utusemi pa kazu naki mwi nari yamakapa no sayakeki mitutu miti wo tadunena
wataru pi no kake ni kipopite tadunetena kiywoki so no miti mata mo apamu tame
mitubo nasu kareru mwi so to pa sireredomo napo si negapitu titose no inoti wo
kenokori no yuki ni apeteru asipikwino yamatatibana wo tutwo ni tumikona
opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi oponoura wo sogapini mitutu miyakwo pye noboru
utipisasu miyakwo no pito ni tugemaku pa misi pi no gotoku ari to tugekoso
muratorino asadati inisi kimi ga upe pa sayakani kikitu omopisi gotoku
muratorino asadati inisi kimi ga upe pa sayakani kikitu omopisi monowo
patuyuki pa tipye ni purisikye kwopwisiku no opokaru ware pa mitutu sinwopamu
okuyama no sikimi ga pana no na no goto ya sikusiku kimi ni kwopwiwatarinamu
yupugwiri ni tidori no nakisi sapodi woba arasi ya sitemu miru yosi wo nami
sapogapa ni koporiwatareru usurabi no usuki kokoro wo wa ga omopanaku ni
asaywopi ni ne nomwi si nakeba yakitatino twogokoro mo are pa omopikanetu mo
kasikwoki ya ame no mikadwo wo kaketureba ne nomwi si nakayu asaywopi nisite
asipikwino yatuwo no tubaki turaturani mi tomo akame ya uwetekyeru kimi
poriye kwoye topoki satwo made okurikyeru kimi ga kokoro pa wasurayu masizi
uturiyuku toki miru gotoni kokoro itaku mukasi no pito si omopoyuru kamo
saku pana pa uturopu toki ari asipikwino yamasuga no ne si nagaku pa arikyeri
toki no pana iya medurasi mo kaku si koso myesiakirameme aki tatu gotoni
ametuti wo terasu pitukwi no kipami naku aru beki monowo nani wo ka omopamu
iza kwodomo tapawaza na se so ametuti no katamesi kuni so yamatosimane pa
miyuki puru puyu pa kyepu nomwi ugupisu no nakamu parupye pa asu ni si aru rasi
utinabiku paru wo tikami ka nubatamano koyopi no tukuywo kasumitaru ramu
aratamano tosi yukigapyeri paru tataba madu wa ga yadwo ni ugupisu pa nakye
opoki umi no minasoko pukaku omopitutu mobiki narasisi sugapara no satwo
tukwi yomeba imada puyu nari sikasugani kasumi tanabiku paru tatinu to ka
patuparu no patune no kyepu no tamabapaki te ni toru karani yuraku tama no wo
midutorino kamopa no iro no awouma wo kyepu miru pito pa kagiri nasi to ipu
utinabiku paru to mo siruku ugupisu pa uwekwi no koma wo naki wataranamu
uramyesiku kimi pa mo aru ka yadwo no ume no tirisuguru made misimezu arikyeru
mimu to ipaba ina to ipame ya ume no pana tirisuguru made kimi ga kimasanu
pasikiyosi kyepu no arwozi pa iswomatu no tune ni imasane ima mo miru goto
wa ga sekwo si kaku si kikosaba ametuti no kamwi wo kopinomi nagaku to so omopu
ume no pana ka wo kagupasimi topokyedomo kokoro mo sinwoni kimi wo si so mopu
yatikusa no pana pa uturopu tokipa naru matu no sayeda wo ware pa musubana
ume no pana sakitiru paru no nagaki pi wo miredomo akanu iswo ni mo aru kamo
kimi ga ipye no ike no siranami iswo ni yose sibasiba mi tomo akamu kimi kamo
urupasi to a ga mopu kimi pa iya pikyeni kimase wa ga sekwo tayuru pi nasi ni
iswo no ura ni tune ywobikisumu wosidori no wosiki a ga mwi pa kimi ga manima ni
takamatwo no nwo no upe no miya pa arenikyeri tatasisi kimi no miyo toposokeba
takamatwo no wo no upe no miya pa arenu tomo tatasisi kimi no mina wasureme ya
takamatwo no nwopye papukuzuno suwe tupini tiyo ni wasuremu wa ga opokimi kamo
papukuzuno tayezu sinwopamu opokimi no myesisi nwopye ni pa sime yupu besi mo
opokimi no tugite myesu rasi takamatwo no nwopye miru gotoni ne nomwi si nakayu
wosi no sumu kimi ga ko no sima kyepu mireba asibi no pana mo sakinikyeru kamo
ikemidu ni kage sape miyete sakinipopu asibi no pana wo swode ni kwokirena
iswokage no miyuru ikemidu teru madeni sakyeru asibi no tiramaku wosi mo
awounapara kazenami nabiki yukusa kusa tutumu koto naku pune pa payakyemu
akikaze no suwe puki nabiku pagwi no pana tomoni kazasazu api ka wakaremu
aratasiki tosi no pazime no patuparu no kyepu puru yuki no iya sikye yogoto
